scope.goal: Establish file-backed AIC-007 evidence and the enforcement contract before implementation.
scope.target: .ai/scripts gate semantics, Git index modes, and transition guidance
constraints: Do not edit implementation during analysis

specifications: Required, conditional-required, advisory, and deferred enforcement classes
architecture_decisions: Retained shell assets default to mode 100755

steps: Inventory Git modes and platform masking
Persist negative scenarios and task split

results.summary: Confirmed 18 shell assets at mode 100644, Windows masking, warning-only required-script skips, and stale archive grep semantics. Defined a seven-stage remediation plan with no blocking decision.
files_changed: durable backlog and workflow discovery artifacts
